text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day off, I spot Air Groove spending time
with her friends.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hoo boy, those flowers smell good! And all these colors have got my heart a-pumpin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So this is the florist you wanted to go to?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes. There's something I'd like to buy.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's certainly no lack of gardening
supplies, to say the least. They've got pots, soil,
and... Is that fertilizer I see over there?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hm, is that where it is now? It looks like they've
rearranged everything since the last time I was
here.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Last time? Do you come here often?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wait—of course you do. Gardening's your hobby,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Haha, I'm flattered you remember.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's an amazing skill, being able to grow flowers. If
I tried to do that, I'm sure they'd all just wilt on
me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say it's without its challenges, but I find
it incredibly fulfilling.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's not all that different from how you maintain
your cleats every day out of your love for
running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It is. While we're on the subject, would you like to
learn more about flowers?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I won't ask you to plant them, but you could start
by learning how to gift them.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You mean... I should pick out some flowers for
someone?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Correct. Giving people flowers is a time-honored
tradition of expressing your feelings. Wouldn't it
be a good way for someone as reserved as
yourself to share their thoughts?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
A flower's beauty reflects the strength with which
it has lived, and people attribute unique
meanings to each bloom.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Why don't we try picking one out?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Gerbera daisies... Wow, they're so bright and full
of life. And they come in so many colors...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Gerbera daisies symbolize "hope" and
"perseverance." They're quite pretty too, which
makes them popular gifts.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't they be perfect for that certain
someone who's been following you around
recently?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you mean Spe? ...You're right, these might
suit her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I think she might be more surprised than happy
though. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, hello?! Whaddabout me?! It's my turn, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If you were givin' me a flower, which one would ya
pick?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: For you? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
How about some oncidium orchids? They're a
brilliant yellow and give off an air of liveliness.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And perhaps most importantly, they're often
known as "dancing ladies."

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, good pick! Let's dance, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Perhaps I should've gone with a flower with the
meaning of "There's a time and place for
everything."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smiling to myself, I make a silent exit so as not to
intrude on their fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Do you read?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Answer my question. Do you read?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You guess? That isn't a very convincing answer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I know that you've been constantly studying
and contemplating how to improve my training
regimen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I hope you continue to put in your best effort.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That is all. Let's begin the meeting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bag she gives me contains a bookmark made
using pressed tweedia flowers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tweediaーa symbol of mutual trust.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And you call yourself a trainer? There's a
mountain of things you should be reading, from
books on technique to records of past races.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
How disappointing. I expected a little more
self-awareness from you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I chose you as my trainer, so don't let me down.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I hope this helps you shape up.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That is all. Let's begin the meeting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bag she gives me contains a bookmark made
using a pressed flame lily blossom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The flame lilyーa symbol of glory.
